name: VERDE BIO HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Verde Bio Holdings, Inc. is an energy company engaged in the acquisition and development of onshore oil and gas properties, focusing on non-operating working interests and royalty interests. The company does not drill or operate wells and generates revenue from royalty payments. It targets oil and gas mineral interests, royalty interests, and select non-operated working interests in major U.S. oil and gas plays.
sellsTo: Oil and gas exploration and production companies

exposures.sentence: The Company is a growing U.S. energy company based in Frisco, Texas, engaged in the acquisition and development of high-probability, lower risk onshore oil and gas properties within the major oil and gas plays in the U.S.
